trivia_bullets.text: Dragon's Maze common with Rakdos guild watermark. The card collapses reanimation and burn into a single six-mana Rakdos sorcery, directly expressing the Rakdos Cult's philosophy of violent theatrical spectacle.

"Let him in. He's on the list." —Olrich, Rakdos club owner. Speaker Olrich is a named Rakdos club owner; the flavor frames a carnarium performance venue with a guest list, treating an erupting body as the headlining act.
CMC 6 at {4}{B}{R}. EDHREC rank 22188 — fringe Commander presence. Pauper-legal but rarely played due to mana cost.
Art by Raymond Swanland, who has over 170 MTG cards credited. Known for high-contrast dramatic action compositions; the fireball eruption with silhouetted crowd is characteristic of his style.
sources: Gatherer artist search, via WebSearch snippet
